articles.author: Chris  Livesay
articles.title: Pope Leo calls for "disarming" of AI in technology-focused encyclical - CBS News
articles.description: In his "Magnifica Humanitas" encyclical, Pope Leo warns that as civilization grapples with the power of AI, the main challenge is remaining "profoundly human."
articles.content: Rome — Pope Leo XIV issued a major document Monday focused largely on the implications of the rise of artificial intelligence for humanity, warning the technology could make civilization itself "less… [+6522 chars]

articles.title: Xreal, Google's smartglasses partner, thinks it has finally mastered this notoriously tricky industry - TechCrunch
articles.description: Chi Xu, the founder and CEO of XREAL, thinks the smart glasses business has finally reached a turning point.
articles.content: The smart glasses industry has long been a tortured dream of Silicon Valley. The premise is appealing enough: What if, to enjoy the benefits of mobile computing, people didn’t have to stare at their … [+3614 chars]

articles.author: Ingrid Fadelli
articles.title: New light-based switch could cut chip energy use and speed future AI photonics - Tech Xplore
articles.description: Photonic devices are hardware systems that can process information using light instead of electricity. These systems could potentially perform computations faster than electronic devices, while also consuming less energy.
